nasb.text: While he was still speaking, another also came and said, “The fire of God fell from heaven and burned up the sheep and the servants and consumed them, and I alone have escaped to tell you.”

esv.text: While he was yet speaking, there came another and said, “The fire of God fell from heaven and burned up the sheep and the servants and consumed them, and I alone have escaped to tell you.”

cnv.text: 這個人還在說話的時候，又有人來說：“　神的火從天上降下來，把群羊和僕人都燒光了，只有我一個人逃脫，來向你報告。”

ccb.text: 话音未落，又有人来报信说：“上帝的火从天而降，烧死了羊群和牧人，只有我一人逃脱来向你报信。”
